rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using valid syntax: assume, guarantee, eq, const, and assign
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes for port references
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if...then...else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not, and implication (=>)
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
Use AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence
Branching logic should use nested if...then...else
Use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not, and implication (=>)
anti_patterns: Do not invent declarations for unresolved references
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
